title: Replace map[:key] dynamic access with static map.key in plot_point/1
prompt: Refactor MyApp.OrderFormatter.plot_point/1 from test_fixtures/map_access_noise.ex. It currently uses `point[:x]`, `point[:y]`, `point[:z]` — the non-assertive map access anti-pattern. Replace with a pattern-matched function head `def plot_point(%{x: x, y: y, z: z})`. Output only `plot_point/1` inside `defmodule MyApp.OrderFormatter do ... end`.

must_contain: def plot_point(%{x: x, y: y, z: z})

tier_rationale: Exact refactor from the official anti-patterns guide example.
research_citation: Elixir anti-patterns guide: 'Non-assertive Map Access — Refactor: def plot(%{x: x, y: y, z: z}), do: {x, y, z}'
